title: Explosion Rebuilder
description: This datapack simply makes different explosions repair themself (creepers, TNT...). Trust me, it's very satisfying.
body:
## How to Use & Information
As always, this pack is multiplayer compatible!

Original Showcase: youtu.be/oO1S-iU0qkI
Updated Showcase: youtu.be/qA6rOKBOkGU

This datapack simply makes different explosion repair themself!
It works with every block in the game! That includes different blockstates and blocks like chests which store items inside.

Uninstall with this command: "/function uninstall:explosion_rebuilder"

A chunk of this pack (v2.0 and below) is made possible by Cloud Wolf's block serialiser (thank you). Watch his video here if interested: https://youtu.be/ZFJ81MlF37U

## Usage in Videos [​YouTubers Please Read]
Feel free to use this creation in your video however I do ask a couple of basic things.
1. Do not imply/claim the creation as your own. To avoid this, it would be appreciated if you could please mention in the video that Scommander created this datapack.
2. Provide credit in the description - linking to my YouTube channel and this download page.
3. Feel free to let me know! It’s nice to watch my creations being put to use :)

## Redistribution
Link to this download page please and do not reupload the creation without permission from myself.

## Installation
How to Install Datapacks & Resource Packs: youtu.be/zhWVPYD9hy4

## 💸 Support Me By Donating?
As a University student working a part-time job, donations help to justify the time creating/coding content. No pressure of course!
💸 PayPal: https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=GDRYDGBP2B4FY
